'''V'troren Tara''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] until he served in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]], following the [[Declaration of a New Order|declaration]] of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. He sat on the [[Procurement Panel/Legends|Procurement Panel]] of the Senate [[Naval Subcommittee/Legends|Naval Subcommittee]].

{{Char-stub}}
